name: AgentScope (Alibaba)
pricing_notes: Open source; Alibaba Cloud DashScope optional for hosted models

auth.notes: Framework-level auth-free; model providers configured with their own credentials

performance.notes: Framework overhead negligible; focuses on distributed multi-agent architecture

agent_readiness.notes: Alibaba Research framework for multi-agent conversation workflows. Actor-model distributed architecture. Supports roleplay agents, pipeline agents, reactive agents. ModelScope integration for Chinese model ecosystem.

gotchas: Documentation primarily in Chinese; English docs less comprehensive
Designed for Alibaba Cloud / ModelScope ecosystem; external model integration requires config
Actor model adds complexity for simple use cases
Less community support outside Chinese AI research community
best_when: Research projects exploring multi-agent conversation patterns
Chinese AI ecosystem (ModelScope, DashScope model integration)
Distributed agent scenarios requiring actor-model concurrency
avoid_when: Teams needing rich ecosystem and tutorials
summary: AgentScope is Alibaba's open-source multi-agent framework using an actor model for distributed agent orchestration. Strong in Chinese AI research community with ModelScope/DashScope integration. Framework is technically sound with interesting distributed patterns, but documentation gaps in English and smaller Western community make it less accessible than LangChain/CrewAI for typical use cases.
